query:
INSERT INTO `ai_providers` (name, displayName, isEnabled, priority, costPer1kTokens) VALUES
('manus', 'Manus AI', true, 0, 200),
('openai', 'OpenAI', false, 1, 500),
('anthropic', 'Anthropic', false, 2, 300),
('google', 'Google AI', false, 3, 125)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE displayName=VALUES(displayName);
